message:
✨ Replace "Open All Product Links" with Add to Cart + multi-vendor handling (#27)

Shopify products now get added to the site cart; Amazon affiliate
products still open in new tabs (separate checkout). Button label
adapts to the item mix: "Add to Cart", "Open on Amazon", or
"Add to Cart & Open Amazon". Inline confirmation shows what happened.
Added tax/shipping note under subtotal: "Taxes and shipping calculated
at checkout. Amazon items purchased separately."

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
